title: Does Gendo have a small penis size according to Anno
display_title: Does Gendo have a small penis size according to Anno
wikitext:
[]: Does Gendo have a small penis size (according to Anno)?             Quote Post by Berserkelion » Sat Jul 11, 2020 2:15 pm Ok. I'm not a native Japanese (or English) speaker, but I recently found a chapter from Parano Evangelion named What's great about Gendo? . In this chapter Anno starts to talk about the size of his ochinchin . For those who don't know, ochichin is the penis. He's not confident and eventually say something about Misato's breast size. Maybe it's just me, but some implication about Gendo's size is here. He's not so massive, if I'm not mistaken; since, as you know, Anno is Gendo and Nerv is a metaphorical rapresentation of Gainax, I wonder if Ikari's masculine behaviour is merely a former reaction to compensate his not-so-massive quality. My Japanese is pretty bad, but this is my partial translation: Takekuma: I was surprised to find out that Ritsuko was a Gendou's lover. […] His wife, Yui Ikari, also says something like "But there's something cute about him." [...] Anno: I wonder what's great about him. Hmm. [...] My concept of cuteness is about the ochinchin. "Oh, it's small". Takekuma: You're not confident about your ochinchin? Anno: I don't have a big penis. […] Well, it's pretty into Japanese standard, or a little smaller. Oizumi: But having a big one is also a problem. I had a friend who was about a bottle of beer, and his lover was mad. Anno: That's a tragedy. Oizumi: A tragedy, really (laughs). […] Well, I’m not big. How about Anno-san? What [size] do you like? Anno: Uhm, well, small is not good, isn’t? But neither too big. Well, I'm a little concerned. Again, I'm not a native Japanese speaker, but this makes me seriously laugh. Does anyone knows Japanese to translate this? I can give you the full text from the chapter: 大泉: うちのかみさん、 赤木 リツコ博士が大好きなんです。 時々、 似たようなことを言うことがあるんで 「似てる」っていうと、 すっげえ喜ぶ。「潔癖症は辛いわよ」って。 竹熊: 最後、 ゲンドゥの愛人だと判朋してビックリしました。 あんなォヤジのどこがいいんですか。 庵野: うーん、 どこでしょうね。 竹熊: 妻の碇 ユイさんも 「でも可愛いとこあるのよ」 みたいなことを言うじゃないですか。 大泉: あれがいろんなギャグのネタになってて。 庵野: どこがいいんでしょうねえ。 うーん。 まあ 一 応、 あるんですけど。言ってもぜんないので。 竹態: それって要するに， 庵野さんのことでもあるわけでしょう (笑)。 庵野: まあ、 ー部そうですね。 竹態: 「こういう人だけど、 でも可愛いとこあるのよ」 っていうのは。 庵野: チンチンですかね (笑)。 僕の可愛いとこっ て、 チンチンぐらいですから。 「あら、 小さい」 とか。 竹熊: そんなに自信ないんでずか? 庵野: チンチンはないですね。 竹熊: 僕もないけどさ (笑)。 大泉: ああ、 同じぐらいだったりして。 やになってきたな (笑)。 庵野: まあ、 日本人の標準ですかね 。 標準よりちょ っと小さい。 大泉: でも、でかすぎるのも問題ですよ。 ビール瓶ぐらいある友人がいて、 風俗嬢に嫌がられたって。 庵野: それはそれで悲劇ですね。 大泉: 悲劇ですよ。 庵野: まあ、 小さいのも 「あら、 もう入ってるの?」 って言われたら、そのショックはもう一生ものですからね。 竹熊: でも女って、そんなに気にしないんじゃない? 実際には。 大泉: 竹熊さんは、どうですか (笑)。 竹熊: 自慢じゃないが包茎です (笑)。 反対にさ、 ォッパ イがでかい小さいって、こだわる人はこだわるかも知れないけれど、 俺はあんまりないよね。 大泉: 僕はでかぃのはダメ。 庵野さんはどうですか。 好みから言うと。 庵野: うーん、 まあ、 小さいのはダメですね。 デヵ過ぎるのもダメ。 よく巨乳マ ンガがあるでしょう。 全然ダメですよ。 もう乳に見えなくて。 竹熊: 牛とか、そういう世界ですよね。 庵野: いゃ、 ないよりあった方がいいんですけど。 あり過ぎるのもどうかなあ。 大泉: 俺、ちょっとミサトだとでかすぎるかな。 竹熊: ミサトさん、あんな食生活で、しかも三〇歳でしょう。 なんでああいうナイス ・バディなんですか。 庵野: でも、乳垂れてましたよわ。ミサトさんも，ハリがなくなってて。

[]: Re: Does Gendo have a small penis size (according to Anno)?             Quote Post by orcot » Sat Jul 11, 2020 2:33 pm And me thinking Gendo was a giant dick all this time. Well live and learn

[]: Re: Does Gendo have a small penis size (according to Anno)?             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Jul 18, 2020 8:34 pm Oizumi: My wife loves Ritsuko Akagi. At times, she says similar things to her and if I mention the resemblance she becomes elated. " It's tough having a fastidious nature ", for example. Takekuma: In the end I was surprised when she was revealed to be Gendo's lover. What's good about old man like him? Anno: Hmm, I wonder what it is indeed. Takekuma: His wife Ikari Yui also says things like " but he also has a cute side ", doesn't she? Oizumi: That became a basis for so many gags. Anno: I wonder what's good about him. Hmm. Well, on one hand, there is something. Even saying that is unseemly. Takekuma: To sum it up, isn't this the case with Anno too, right? (laugh) Anno: Well, that is partly the case. Takekuma: Isn't the gist here "though he is this kind of person, he also has a cute side"? Anno: Maybe it's about penis. (laugh) My penis is the only cute part of me. "Oh my, how tiny!" and the like. Takekuma: Do you lack confidence that badly? Anno: I lack a penis. Takekuma: It's not like I have much to talk about either. (laugh) Oizumi: What if your sizes match. This is becoming terrible. (laugh) Anno: Well, I guess mine would be about the average size for Japanese. Slightly smaller than average. Oizumi: However, being too big is also a problem. My friend has one like a beer bottle, and prostitutes hate it. Anno: That is also a tragedy in its own way. Oizumi: It truly is a tragedy. Anno: Well, if you're small and hear "oh, it's already in?" the shock will last a lifetime. Takekuma: But women don't really care that much, do they? In reality. Oizumi: Well how are you hung, Oizumi? (laugh) Takekuma: This is not a brag but I have a phimosis. (laugh) Reversely, I guess people who fixate on breast size care about boobs being small or big, but I don't really mind the size much. Oizumi: I can't stand big boobs. How about you, Anno? In terms of preferences. Anno: Hmm, well, small ones are no good. Too big is no good either. There's a lot Giant Tits manga out there, right. That's completely out of question. They don't even look like breasts anymore. Takekuma: It's a world of cows or the like. Anno: Well no, it's better to have some rather than none at all but I do wonder if having too much is good either. Oizumi: Speaking for myself, Misato and the like might be slightly too big. Takekuma: Misato, what is up with her sexy body? Especially with those eating habits and she's already 3X years old, right? Anno: But her boobs have started to sag. Even Misato has lost resilience of her skin.
